INBOX_MGMT.DESCRIPTION: A channel is the mode of communication your customer chooses to interact with you. An inbox is where you manage interactions for a specific channel. It can include communications from various sources such as email, live chat, and social media.

AUTH.TITLE: Choose a channel
AUTH.DESC: Nauto Console supports live-chat widgets, Facebook Messenger, WhatsApp, Emails, etc., as channels. If you want to build a custom channel, you can create it using the API channel. To get started, choose one of the channels below.

AGENTS.TITLE: Agents
AGENTS.DESC:
Here you can add agents to manage your newly created inbox. Only these selected agents will have access to your inbox. Agents which are not part of this inbox will not be able to see or respond to messages in this inbox when they login.
PS: As an administrator, if you need access to all inboxes, you should add yourself as agent to all inboxes that you create.
AGENTS.VALIDATION_ERROR: Add at least one agent to your new Inbox

DETAILS.TITLE: Inbox Details
DETAILS.DESC: From the dropdown below, select the Facebook Page you want to connect to Nauto Console. You can also give a custom name to your inbox for better identification.

FINISH.TITLE: Nailed It!
FINISH.DESC:
You have successfully finished integrating your Facebook Page with Nauto Console. Next time a customer messages your Page, the conversation will automatically appear on your inbox.
We are also providing you with a widget script that you can easily add to your website. Once this is live on your website, customers can message you right from your website without the help of any external tool and the conversation will appear right here, on Nauto Console.
Cool, huh? Well, we sure try to be :)

EMAIL_PROVIDER.TITLE: Select your email provider
EMAIL_PROVIDER.DESCRIPTION: Select an email provider from the list below. If you don't see your email provider in the list, you can select the other provider option and provide the IMAP and SMTP Credentials.

MICROSOFT.TITLE: Microsoft Email
MICROSOFT.DESCRIPTION: Click on the Sign in with Microsoft button to get started. You will redirected to the email sign in page. Once you accept the requested permissions, you would be redirected back to the inbox creation step.

WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.TITLE: WhatsApp Templates
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage WhatsApp message templates. Templates must be approved by Meta before they can be used to send messages.
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.PURPOSE_NOTE: WhatsApp only allows free-form messages within 24 hours of a customer's last message. After this window closes, you must use pre-approved templates to contact customers. Templates are essential for: order confirmations, shipping updates, appointment reminders, payment notifications, and marketing campaigns.
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.EMPTY_STATE: No templates found. Create your first template to get started.
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.FETCH_ERROR: Failed to load templates. Please try again.
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.CREATE_SUCCESS: Template created successfully and sent for approval.
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.CREATE_ERROR: Failed to create template. Please try again.
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.DELETE_ERROR: Failed to delete template. Please try again.
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.DELETE_PERMISSION_ERROR: Insufficient permissions to delete this template. Please check your WhatsApp Business Account permissions in Meta Business Manager.
WHATSAPP_TEMPLATES.DELETE_UNDER_REVIEW: Cannot delete template while it is under review by Meta.

CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete Template
CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete the template

LIST.NO_RESULTS: No templates found matching your filters.

WARNING.TITLE: Important: Meta Restriction - Templates cannot be edited
WARNING.MESSAGE: Due to Meta's WhatsApp Business API restrictions, templates cannot be modified once created. You can create templates with the same name in different languages, but within the same language, the name must be unique. Also, once a name is used in a language, it cannot be reused even if you delete the template.

META_APPROVAL.TITLE: Meta Approval Process
META_APPROVAL.MESSAGE: Template approval is subject to Meta's proprietary filters. You may need to try creating the template multiple times. The review process is guaranteed within 24 hours, but typically takes just a few minutes.
META_APPROVAL.REJECTION_TITLE: Your template may be rejected due to:
META_APPROVAL.REASON_2: Meta's NLP (Natural Language Processing) text analysis
META_APPROVAL.REASON_3: User feedback (reports, blocks) from users who have previously received templates from your business
META_APPROVAL.REASON_4: Your account history and business reputation on WhatsApp

NAME.LABEL: Template Name
NAME.HELP: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only. Must start with a letter. Minimum 3 characters.

CATEGORY_OPTIONS.UTILITY_DESC: Allows businesses to follow up on user actions or requests, as these messages are usually triggered by user actions. Examples: order confirmations, shipping updates, account alerts, appointment reminders, payment notifications. Lower cost per message.
CATEGORY_OPTIONS.MARKETING_DESC: Allows businesses to achieve a wide range of goals, from generating awareness to driving sales and retargeting customers. Examples: offers, discounts, product announcements, newsletters, and any message that doesn't fit utility criteria. Higher cost per message.

HEADER.TITLE: Header (Optional)
HEADER.MEDIA_URL_HELP: Provide a publicly accessible URL for the sample media. This is used for template approval only.

BODY.LABEL: Body Text
BODY.PLACEHOLDER_POSITIONAL: Hello {'{{'}1{'}}'}, your order #{'{{'}2{'}}'} has been shipped!
BODY.PLACEHOLDER_NAMED: Hello {'{{'}variable_1{'}}'}, your order #{'{{'}variable_2{'}}'} has been shipped!
BODY.HELP: Use positional variables ({'{{'}1{'}}'}, {'{{'}2{'}}'}) OR named variables ({'{{'}variable_1{'}}'}, {'{{'}variable_2{'}}'}). Do not mix both types.
BODY.VAR_RULES: Variables cannot be at the beginning or end of the message. Use letters, numbers, and underscores only inside {'{{'}  {'}}'}.
BODY.FORMAT_MISMATCH_POSITIONAL: The template contains incorrectly formatted variable parameters. Positional variable parameters must be sequential numbers with two pairs of curly braces (e.g., {'{{'}1{'}}'}, {'{{'}2{'}}'}, {'{{'}3{'}}'}).
BODY.FORMAT_MISMATCH_NAMED: The template contains incorrectly formatted variable parameters. Named variable parameters must be lowercase characters, underscores, and numbers with two pairs of curly braces (e.g., {'{{'}customer_name{'}}'}, {'{{'}order_id{'}}'}).

VAR_SAMPLES.TITLE: Variable Samples
VAR_SAMPLES.DESCRIPTION: Include sample values for all variables so Meta can review your template. Do not include real customer data to protect privacy.

FOOTER.LABEL: Footer (Optional)
FOOTER.HELP: Add a short footer message. Maximum 60 characters.

PREVIEW.TITLE: Message Preview
PREVIEW.NOTE: This is an approximation. Actual appearance may vary slightly on WhatsApp.

ERRORS.NAME_FORMAT: Use only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores. Must start with a letter.
ERRORS.NAME_MIN: Template name must be at least 3 characters.
ERRORS.BODY_VARS: Numeric variables must be sequential starting from {'{{'}1{'}}'}. Example: {'{{'}1{'}}'}, {'{{'}2{'}}'}, {'{{'}3{'}}'}.
ERRORS.UNCLOSED_BRACES: Unclosed variable braces. Make sure each {{ has a matching }}.
ERRORS.EMPTY_VARIABLE: Empty variable detected. Variables cannot be empty.
ERRORS.INVALID_VAR_FORMAT: Invalid variable format: {vars}. Use only letters, numbers, and underscores.
ERRORS.VAR_POSITION: Variables cannot be at the beginning or end of the template.
ERRORS.SELF_REFERENCE: Example value for {vars} cannot reference itself

WHATSAPP_GROUPS.SUB_TITLE: Special inbox for WhatsApp group conversations
WHATSAPP_GROUPS.NOTE: Note: This is a system-managed inbox used exclusively for WhatsApp group conversations. It is automatically created and cannot be modified or deleted.

FAQ_CONFIGURATION.TITLE: FAQ Categories
FAQ_CONFIGURATION.DESC: Select FAQ categories that the AI agent can use to answer common questions.
FAQ_CONFIGURATION.NO_CATEGORIES: No FAQ categories available. Create categories in Knowledge Base > FAQs first.
